name: Curried Chicken Wings

source.cookbook: The Complete and Authentic Thai Curry Cookbook 2
source.author: Various

ingredients.item: pc leek, trimmed and thinly sliced

method: Heat a tbsp. of peanut oil in a wok on high heat and brown chicken wings
for about 3 minutes per batch, flipping once.
Oil and heat the pan and cook the leeks until they are softened.
Stir in curry paste and let it cook for a minute.
Put back chicken wings, plus squash. Pour in coconut milk and water.
Remove the lid, stir in chickpeas, and let cook for another 10 minutes.
Garnish with freshly chopped basil leaves.
